rolling_30d.summary: Burrachos' local pages property recorded 3,649 sessions in the last 30 days, declining 5.9% MoM as overall engagement rate fell 3.6 percentage points to 45.3%. While organic search remains the dominant and stable channel (73.0% of traffic, +0.7% MoM), paid channels are experiencing significant headwinds: Paid Search dropped 36.7% MoM and Paid Social collapsed 88.9%, suggesting either budget cuts or underperformance requiring audit. High-value conversion events are mixed—mainsite_clicks declined 18.3% MoM to 1,670 events, but order_pickup surged 15.2% to 1,292 events and apply_online jumped 66.7%, indicating some funnel diversification away from site-to-site navigation. The Sun Prairie location (/wisconsin/sun-prairie/2691-windsor-st) remains the traffic engine with 1,020 sessions and stable 42.4% engagement, while Brookfield's flagship page dropped 31.3% MoM despite strong 52.0% engagement—a volume problem, not a quality issue. YTD 2026 shows steady monthly performance (3.6K–3.7K sessions Jan–Mar), suggesting consistent baseline traffic but no meaningful growth trajectory.

quick_wins.title: Capitalize on order_pickup momentum
quick_wins.detail: order_pickup events grew 15.2% MoM to 1,292—significantly outpacing the overall traffic decline. Double down on pickup-focused CTAs and landing page optimization for /wisconsin/onalaska/9432-wisconsin-16 (which drove +25.8% traffic) to sustain this trend.

quick_wins.title: Apply_online showing early traction
quick_wins.detail: apply_online events jumped 66.7% MoM to 15—a small absolute number but strong directional signal. Promote and streamline this funnel on high-traffic location pages to capture job applicants and build recruiting pipeline.

quick_wins.title: Organic Search stability is a foundation
quick_wins.detail: Organic search sessions grew +0.7% MoM despite overall -5.9% decline, maintaining 73% of traffic. Protect and expand this channel through continued local SEO and location page optimization—it's your most reliable driver.

potential_warnings.title: Paid channels are in freefall
potential_warnings.detail: Paid Search dropped 36.7% MoM (250 sessions) and Paid Social collapsed 88.9% (8 sessions). Without YoY context, this suggests budget reallocation, campaign pauses, or poor ROAS—urgent audit needed to determine root cause.

potential_warnings.title: High-value mainsite_clicks declining sharply
potential_warnings.detail: mainsite_clicks fell 18.3% MoM to 1,670 events, the largest decline among high-intent actions. This suggests fewer users are following through to the main website from location pages—may indicate funnel friction or lost cross-property visibility.

potential_warnings.title: View_menu engagement down 20% MoM
potential_warnings.detail: view_menu events dropped 20.0% MoM to 1,348, a steeper decline than overall traffic (-5.9%). Users are less motivated to browse menus, which could signal reduced menu interest, mobile UX friction, or shift toward delivery/pickup intent.

potential_warnings.title: Brookfield flagship page traffic collapsed
potential_warnings.detail: /wisconsin/brookfield/17530-w-bluemound-rd dropped 31.3% MoM despite a healthy 52.0% engagement rate. This is a volume problem—investigate whether organic rankings or paid visibility declined for this high-performing location.

potential_warnings.title: Store_locate events down 56.9% MoM
potential_warnings.detail: store_locate fell 56.9% MoM to just 22 events, indicating sharply declining location-finder interest. If users can't find or navigate to locations easily, foot traffic and order pickup conversions could suffer downstream.

biggest_opportunities.title: Resurrect Paid Search and Social strategy
biggest_opportunities.detail: Paid Search (36.7% decline) and Paid Social (88.9% decline) are severely underutilized. Reactivate or restructure campaigns targeting high-intent location keywords (e.g., 'Burrachos Sun Prairie order online') to recapture paid traffic and offset organic saturation.

biggest_opportunities.title: Optimize Brookfield location page to recover volume
biggest_opportunities.detail: /wisconsin/brookfield/17530-w-bluemound-rd has excellent 52.0% engagement but fell 31.3% MoM in sessions. Audit SERP visibility, paid visibility, and internal linking—this page has proven conversion quality and deserves traffic recovery investment.

biggest_opportunities.title: Expand Onalaska location momentum
biggest_opportunities.detail: /wisconsin/onalaska/9432-wisconsin-16 drove 25.8% traffic growth MoM (848 sessions) with 42.9% engagement. Replicate this page's structure, keyword strategy, and CTAs across underperforming locations to drive compounding gains.

biggest_opportunities.title: Fix store_locate funnel to support location discovery
biggest_opportunities.detail: store_locate dropped 56.9% MoM to 22 events, but locate_me grew 26.1%—suggesting users prefer one interaction type. Consolidate or simplify location-finding UX and measure if improvement lifts order_pickup and calls.

biggest_opportunities.title: Investigate mainsite_clicks decline to strengthen cross-property funnel
biggest_opportunities.detail: mainsite_clicks fell 18.3% MoM despite stable organic traffic. Test whether homepage CTAs, internal navigation clarity, or main-site landing page relevance are blocking the path—recovery here could unlock upsell and brand-building opportunities.

last_calendar_month.summary: March 2026 traffic grew modestly to 3,712 sessions (+1.5% MoM), driven by strong organic search momentum (+9.4%) and direct traffic (+14.8%), but engagement quality declined measurably with engaged sessions down 6.2% and engagement rate dropping 3.7 percentage points to 45.6%. High-value conversion signals are mixed: mainsite_clicks fell 9.8% to 1,730 events, while order_pickup surged 22.1% to 1,305 events, suggesting users are converting to actionable takeaway/delivery intents rather than exploring deeper funnel content. View_menu declined sharply (-12.7%), indicating reduced browsing behavior, though locate_me and apply_online showed strong growth (+36.4% and +66.7% respectively). Paid search investment appears to be underperforming, dropping 34.6% MoM while paid social collapsed 85.7%, raising questions about channel efficiency. Location-level performance is uneven: the Onalaska location (/wisconsin/onalaska/9432-wisconsin-16) accelerated 37.3% MoM and now ranks second in traffic, while the flagship Brookfield and Sun Prairie pages experienced double-digit engagement declines. YTD 2026 stands at 11,005 sessions across Q1 with a flat trajectory (Jan: 3,636, Feb: 3,657, Mar: 3,712).

quick_wins.title: Capitalize on Organic Search Momentum
quick_wins.detail: Organic search grew 9.4% MoM to 2,717 sessions (73.2% of total traffic). Reinforce SEO for high-performing location pages like Onalaska (+37.3%) and Eau-Claire (+30.0% for regional hub) to sustain this channel's dominance.

quick_wins.title: Amplify Order Pickup Conversion Signal
quick_wins.detail: Order_pickup events jumped 22.1% MoM to 1,305—the strongest custom event growth. Optimize post-pickup prompts (e.g., loyalty signups, feedback requests) and ensure mobile UX for this intent is frictionless.

quick_wins.title: Scale Direct Traffic Channel
quick_wins.detail: Direct traffic grew 14.8% MoM to 698 sessions. Strengthen brand recall and retention via email campaigns and SMS to sustain and grow this high-intent channel.

potential_warnings.title: Engagement Quality Deteriorating Despite Traffic Growth
potential_warnings.detail: Sessions grew 1.5% MoM but engaged sessions fell 6.2%, and engagement rate declined 3.7 pp to 45.6%. This disconnect suggests traffic quality is declining or user intent is narrowing—investigate landing page bounce behavior and session flow on underperformers.

potential_warnings.title: Mainsite Clicks Declining (High-Value Funnel Signal at Risk)
potential_warnings.detail: Mainsite_clicks dropped 9.8% MoM to 1,730 events—the highest-value conversion indicator beyond immediate order actions. This suggests reduced cross-site navigation and deeper funnel exploration, potentially signaling lower purchase intent or abandoned browsing.

potential_warnings.title: Paid Search ROI Questionable; Paid Channels Underperforming
potential_warnings.detail: Paid search fell 34.6% MoM (251 sessions) and paid social collapsed 85.7% (10 sessions). Combined paid channels now represent <7% of traffic; audit spend allocation and keyword/audience targeting immediately to justify continued investment.

potential_warnings.title: View_Menu Engagement Down 12.7%—Browsing Intent Weakening
potential_warnings.detail: Menu views dropped from ~1,587 to 1,387 events MoM, a 12.7% decline. This suggests users are arriving with narrow intent (order pickup/delivery) rather than exploring full offerings, limiting upsell opportunities.

potential_warnings.title: Store Locate Conversions Collapsed 54%
potential_warnings.detail: Store_locate events plummeted from ~50 to 23 MoM, a 54% drop—a high-intent, high-value signal. Audit location finder UX, ensure store information is fresh, and investigate whether navigation to this feature is visible on key landing pages.

biggest_opportunities.title: Reverse Engagement Decline on High-Traffic Location Pages
biggest_opportunities.detail: Brookfield (/wisconsin/brookfield/17530-w-bluemound-rd) and Sun Prairie (/wisconsin/sun-prairie/2691-windsor-st) locations are top traffic generators (744 and 1,018 sessions respectively) but show engagement rate volatility—Brookfield declined 24.2% MoM. Test landing page messaging, CTA clarity, and menu discoverability to re-engage these high-volume audiences.

biggest_opportunities.title: Rebuild Mainsite_Clicks Funnel (Deeper Conversion Path)
biggest_opportunities.detail: High-value mainsite_clicks declined 9.8% while order_pickup surged. Create prominent, contextual calls-to-action linking order pickup/delivery flows to broader menu exploration, promotions, or loyalty sign-up on the main site to reattach users to deeper funnel.

biggest_opportunities.title: Reactivate or Redirect Paid Search Spend
biggest_opportunities.detail: Paid search yielded only 251 sessions in March (-34.6% MoM) and likely has unfavorable ROAS. Reallocate budget to organic amplification or test performance max campaigns targeting high-intent keywords (e.g., 'order pickup + location') to improve efficiency.

biggest_opportunities.title: Double Down on Locate_Me Growth (Mobile-First)
biggest_opportunities.detail: Locate_me events grew 36.4% MoM to 30—a small absolute base but fastest-growing location-related signal. Promote this feature in paid and organic channels (especially mobile SERPs) to capture high-intent local searches and drive traffic to nearby locations.

biggest_opportunities.title: Investigate and Fix Store_Locate Regression
biggest_opportunities.detail: Store_locate collapsed 54% MoM to 23 events despite overall traffic growth. Audit technical implementation (map load speed, search accuracy), ensure feature is prominently discoverable from /wisconsin/* hub pages, and A/B test placement to reverse this trend.
